name: Toey Weedz Smoke One
short_description: An funny early 3D retro inspired FPS. Become Mr. Weedz himself and fight on the power of Evil. Pass through 6 unique level and upgrade a Toey with gunz and skillz to put an end to the madness once and for all!
detailed_description:
The Evil Ones are back again!
The Worldz full of D!cks and only Toey Weedz can stop em!
But is he gonna do it?
Because usually he dont gives a F...
Only plays the good old retro gamez and smoking the weedz..
But this time its something personal!

Taken away his own plants and his only hobby, the smoking of good weedz

he is now pushed to the limit, conquering the worldz, killing the d!cks and gettin the plants he needs!
To pay his depts and to buy his equipment..

  • Play 6 unique designed Levels, and experience a story about Toey Weedz and his arch enemy Arnold D!ckler

  • A clever, from early retrogames inspired leveldesign, with a Hub as a center Point, Collectibles and many different tasks will delight you for several hours

  • Buy Equipment and weapons to be prepared for the next level

  • Let Toey hang out in his own room with different designoptions

  • Pay depts, to put an end to the madness once and for all

Okay!

This thing is different from anything you've ever played, guaranteed!

Toey Weedz Smoke One is a slightly different first-person shooter.

Imagine a game that you knew from back then and is still exactly as you remember it today, even though it was never released before!

This game is Toey Weedz Smoke One!

100% handmade (based on the Unreal Engine4)

A retro shooter of a slightly different kind with the best from the past combined with features from the modern era!

Tobias Alexander Knobloch has created a game out of his love of life and the early 3D retro console games that stands out in a variety of areas due to its uniqueness and comedic craziness and will always remind you how wonderful, or annoying, video games were in your childhood!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Polish, Russian, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
